title: Add Pinake AI agent skill and installer command
description: Completed. Added the packaged `resources/skills/pinake/SKILL.md`, implemented a user-scoped Pinake agent skill installer with safe `CODEX_HOME`/`~/.codex` target resolution and overwrite confirmation, exposed `Pinakes: Install Agent Skill` in the Command Palette and Project Documentation toolbar, and covered install behavior plus contribution wiring with tests.

checklist.text: Implement safe Codex skill target resolution using `CODEX_HOME` then `~/.codex`.
Add `pinakes.installAgentSkill` activation, command contribution, view button/menu entry, and command registration.
Implement copy/install flow with existing-file comparison and overwrite confirmation.
Add tests for target resolution, packaged source path, overwrite behavior, and command wiring.
Verify with `npm run compile`, `npm run lint`, `npm test`, and `npm pack --dry-run`.
